title: File not writable in n8n v2.0
symptom: When executing a workflow that writes to a file, n8n throws an error stating that the file is not writable after upgrading to version 2.0.
applies_when: Using Read/Write Files from Disk node
Upgraded from n8n v1.120.0 to v2.0
not_this_if: File access restrictions are not configured
root_cause: In n8n v2.0, a new security feature restricts file access to specific directories. If the environment variable N8N_RESTRICT_FILE_ACCESS_TO is not set, attempts to write to files outside the allowed directories will fail.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable N8N_RESTRICT_FILE_ACCESS_TO to the directories you want to allow access to.
Restart the n8n instance to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Configure the N8N_RESTRICT_FILE_ACCESS_TO environment variable to include the necessary directories for file access.
